title: More Nonsense Limerick 19
content:
There was an old person of Brill,
    Who purchased a shirt with a frill;
    But they said, "Don't you wish, 
    You mayn't look like a fish,
    You obsequious old person of Brill?"
meaning:
This evocative piece by Edward Lear, titled "More Nonsense Limerick 19", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
